nodes.label: Run AI analysis on provided text materials.
Accept an analysis, run it in the background, return a job id to poll.
Poll an analysis job. 404 if unknown (e.g. lost to a cold start).
Stream a chat response from Claude as Server-Sent Events.
Extract uploaded file text without blocking the event loop on parsing work.
Fetch a URL and extract its text content for use as a case material.
Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper. Accepts webm, mp4, mp3, wav, ogg, m4a.
Convert brief_markdown to a DOCX file and return it for download.
Add a paragraph run with basic bold/italic support.
Validate the Supabase bearer token and return the user id, or 401/503.
Create (or reuse) the trainer's Express account and return an onboarding URL.
Return {onboarded, charges_enabled} for the authenticated trainer.
Create a one-off payment link on the trainer's connected account (1% fee).
Create a Stripe Checkout Session for the Maxx plan and return its URL.      Retu
Return the caller's Maxx membership {active, plan, expires_at}.
Stripe webhook → grant/revoke Maxx entitlements. Verifies the signature.
